bugs.title: Salary field incorrectly displays 0 in the results table
bugs.reproducedBy: TC-01: Successful employee registration with all valid fields
reproductionSteps: 1. Fill out the registration form with valid data
4. Scroll down to the 'Empleados Registrados' table
bugs.expectedBehavior: The 'Salario' column in the table should display '60000'.

bugs.title: Age validation fails for lower bound (under 18)
bugs.expectedBehavior: An error message 'La edad debe estar entre 18 y 65 años' should be displayed under the Age field.
bugs.actualBehavior: No error message is displayed for age 17, and the form submission is not correctly blocked or reported as an error for this field.
